tasks.title: Review OB&CO project pipeline for May
tasks.description:

- Amart Joondalup — Fredon Air WA
- AOC Building 3 Toilet Block Design
- 97 South Perth Esplanade
- Byford Health Hub
- Arco Hood Street Subiaco
